headline: Lam Research Corporation Declares Quarterly Dividend
summary: Lam Research Corporation (Nasdaq: LRCX) today announced that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly dividend of $0.26 per share of common stock. The dividend payment will be made on July 8, 2026, to holders of record on June 17, 2026. Future dividend payments are subject to review and approval by the Board of Directors.

headline: SpaceX IPO Filing Shows There Is No Finalized Terafab Deal With Tesla, Intel
summary: SpaceX's latest filing shows new details about the agreements with Tesla and Intel, its two partners in the Terafab AI chip factory.

headline: Stocks Indexes Turn Green in Afternoon Trade as Oil Prices Retreat
summary: The S&P 500 Index ($SPX ) (SPY ) is up +0.15%, the Dow Jones Industrial Average ($DOWI ) (DIA ) is up +0.34%, and the Nasdaq 100 Index ($IUXX ) (QQQ ) is up +0.14%. Equity markets are pushing higher this afternoon, tracking a sharp midday reversal in energy markets...

headline: LAM RESEARCH CORP (NASDAQ:LRCX) Fits the GARP Mold with Strong Growth and Reasonable Valuation
summary: Lam Research (LRCX) fits the Growth at a Reasonable Price strategy with strong 46.8% EPS growth, reasonable valuation, and top-tier profitability. A key semiconductor equipment stock for GARP investors.

headline: Nvidia Delivers Again But the Market Has Already Moved On
summary: Wednesday's session didn't need Nvidia's numbers to go green. The chip sector had already decided to buy the rumor. When the actual results arrived after the close, they were staggering. And the stock fell.

headline: 1 Mooning  Stock to Own for Decades and 2 Facing Challenges
summary: The stocks in this article are all trading near their 52-week highs. This strength often reflects positive developments such as new product launches, favorable industry trends, or improved financial performance.
